q: Describe a successful sportsperson you admire
cue_card: And explain why you admire them
examiner_note: Tập trung vào nỗ lực và tinh thần thể thao của họ.

samples.band7: I admire Lionel Messi, the famous football player. He is successful because he has incredible natural talent and has worked hard since he was a child. I admire him because he is very humble despite being one of the greatest athletes in history. He's a great role model for young people.
samples.band8: I have immense admiration for Lionel Messi, who is widely regarded as one of the greatest footballers of all time. His success is a result of a rare combination of innate genius and relentless hard work. What I truly admire about him is his humility and his sportsmanship on and off the pitch. Despite his global fame, he remains incredibly grounded, which I find very inspiring.
samples.band9: The sportsperson I most admire is Lionel Messi. His career is a testament to the heights that can be reached through a synthesis of extraordinary talent and unwavering dedication. Beyond his technical prowess and his numerous accolades, it is his understated character and his resilience in the face of pressure that I find most compelling. He embodies a level of grace and professional integrity that transcends the world of sports, making him a global icon of excellence.

v.example: He has an innate genius for music.

v.meaning: năng lực kỹ thuật tuyệt vời
v.example: She showed great technical prowess on the piano.

topic: Describe a successful sportsperson you admire
